steps.title: Connect the two clauses
steps.content: The clause before the blank says the Netherlands ceased to be part of the Spanish Empire in 1648. The clause after the blank explains the result: its connection to the empire is now so weak that Spanish is seldom spoken there.

steps.title: Use a colon for elaboration
steps.content: A creates a comma splice, B creates a run-on, and D joins the clauses too loosely with "and." A colon correctly introduces the explanation that follows from the 1648 separation. The answer is C.
